title: TOEIC Listening Part 1 - Photographs (With Audio Timing Demo)

questions.question: Look at the picture. What is the man doing?
questions.optionA: He is walking on the street
questions.optionB: He is sitting at a desk
questions.optionD: He is talking on the phone
questions.explanation: The man is clearly walking on the street in the picture. Audio plays from 5.0s to 15.5s (10.5s duration).

questions.question: Look at the picture. Where are the people?
questions.explanation: The picture shows people in a park with trees and benches. Audio plays from 20.0s to 28.3s (8.3s duration).

questions.question: Look at the picture. What can you see?
questions.explanation: The image clearly shows a boat on the water. Audio plays from 35.7s to 47.2s (11.5s duration).
